mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dicom_server_callback_log ( hospital_id, dicom_server_id, dedupe_key, payload_sha256, event, accession_number, dicom_server_study_id, dicom_server_patient_id, dicom_server_series_ids, payload, success, error_message, warning_message, received_at, last_received_at, attempt_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{entry.hospitalId}, #{entry.dicomServerId}, #{entry.dedupeKey}, #{entry.payloadSha256}, #{entry.event}, #{entry.accessionNumber}, #{entry.dicomServerStudyId}, #{entry.dicomServerPatientId}, CAST(COALESCE(#{entry.dicomServerSeriesIdsJson}, '[]') AS JSONB), CAST(COALESCE(#{entry.payloadJson}, '{}') AS JSONB), COALESCE(#{entry.success}, false), #{entry.errorMessage}, #{entry.warningMessage}, COALESCE(CAST(#{entry.receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), COALESCE(CAST(#{entry.receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), 1, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO dicom_server_unmatched_callback_log ( dicom_server_id, dedupe_key, payload_sha256, event, accession_number, dicom_server_study_id, dicom_server_patient_id, dicom_server_series_ids, payload, success, error_message, warning_message, received_at, last_received_at, attempt_count, created_at ) VALUES ( #{entry.dicomServerId}, #{entry.dedupeKey}, #{entry.payloadSha256}, #{entry.event}, #{entry.accessionNumber}, #{entry.dicomServerStudyId}, #{entry.dicomServerPatientId}, CAST(COALESCE(#{entry.dicomServerSeriesIdsJson}, '[]') AS JSONB), CAST(COALESCE(#{entry.payloadJson}, '{}') AS JSONB), COALESCE(#{entry.success}, false), #{entry.errorMessage}, #{entry.warningMessage}, COALESCE(CAST(#{entry.receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), COALESCE(CAST(#{entry.receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), 1, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET attempt_count = dicom_server_unmatched_callback_log.attempt_count + 1, last_received_at = EXCLUDED.last_received_at, success = dicom_server_unmatched_callback_log.success OR EXCLUDED.success, error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message, warning_message = EXCLUDED.warning_message
